printer_verbatim: The 'Civil and Military Gazette' Press, Lahore.
title: The Urdu Punjab Record, Part II, Executive, Volume XLIII, No. 2
gloss: Part II, Executive, Volume XLIII, No. 2, for the quarter ending June, 1908.
price: Rs. 8, 4 annas (annual subscription in advance); 12 annas (single copy)
copyright: The Proprietors, 'Civil and Military Gazette' Press, Lahore; No. 17, dated the 14th January, 1910.
notes: Urdu Punjab Record Executive, June-1908 quarter. Periodical. Long composite pagination preserved.

title: The Urdu Punjab Record, Volume XLIII, No. 4
gloss: Volume XLIII, No. 4, for the quarter ending December, 1908.
copyright: The Proprietors, 'Civil and Military Gazette' Press, Lahore; No. 22, dated the 14th January, 1910.
notes: Urdu Punjab Record, Dec-1908 quarter. Periodical. Composite pagination.

title: The Urdu Punjab Record, Part I, Judicial, Volume XLIV, Nos. 9 and 10
gloss: Part I, Judicial, Volume XLIV, Nos. 9 and 10, for September and October, 1909.
copyright: The Proprietors, 'Civil and Military Gazette' Press, Lahore; No. 34, dated the 21st March, 1910.
notes: Urdu Punjab Record Judicial, Sept-Oct 1909 double-number, registered 11 March 1910 (within the current quarter). Periodical.

title: Index to the Urdu Punjab Record, Part II, Executive, Volume XLIII
gloss: Index to the Urdu Punjab Record, Part II, Executive, Volume XLIII, for 1908. Edited by Mr Ganpat Rai, Barrister-at-Law, Lahore, and published by the 'Civil and Military Gazette' Press, Lahore.
copyright: The Proprietors, 'Civil and Military Gazette' Press, Lahore; No. 23, dated the 14th January, 1910.
notes: An annual INDEX volume to the Urdu Punjab Record — the finding-apparatus of the law-report itself registered as a separate publication (the meta-text/indexing layer of the legal archive). Closes the URDU (LAW) periodicals. Periodical. Long composite pagination.

title: Anath Hiteshi, Anath Alaya, Ferozepore ka Mahwari Risala
gloss: The quarterly magazine of the Arya Samaj Orphanage at Ferozepore dealing with income and expenditure, Volume V, No. 5, for November 1909. Edited by Lala Jagan Nath, Ferozepore and published by the Secretary, Orphanage, Ferozepore.
notes: House magazine of the Arya Samaj ORPHANAGE at Ferozepore (income/expenditure reporting) — the Arya-Samaj social-welfare institution's periodical; orphanages were a key site of the shuddhi/famine-relief-and-conversion contest between Arya Samaj, Christian missions, and Muslim bodies. pencil 'Specimen'. Institutional/reform periodical. Reg 380 = the year's near-highest number. Periodical.

title: Anath Hiteshi, Anath Alaya, Ferozepore ka Mahwari Risala, Volume V, No. 6
gloss: The quarterly magazine of the Arya Samaj Orphanage at Ferozepore dealing with income and expenditure, Volume V, No. 6, for December, 1909, and January, 1910. Edited by Lala Jagan Nath, Ferozepore, and published by the Secretary, Orphanage, Ferozepore.
notes: Dec-1909/Jan-1910 number of the Arya Samaj Orphanage magazine. pencil 'Specimen'. Periodical.

title: Vedic Philosophy
gloss: A monthly magazine containing the text of Gaud Pada's Karika on the Manduka Upanishad, with Urdu translation and criticism. Edited by Swami Darshnanand.
notes: 'Vedic Philosophy' — a monthly serializing Gaudapada's Karika on the Mandukya Upanishad (a foundational Advaita-Vedanta text) with Urdu translation and 'criticism', edited by Swami Darshnanand (a noted Arya-Samaj polemicist) — high Vedantic philosophy issued as a popular Urdu-mediated periodical; the intellectualization of the Hindu-revival press. Closes the entire 1910Q1 catalogue. pencil marks in left margin. English-titled. Periodical.
